title: ASR Outdoor 8" Woodsmen Folding Pocket Knife Wood Handle Camping Gear Carving
description:
If you're an avid hunter, camper, hiker or outdoor enthusiast, then you know how important it is to have a durable pocket knife on hand for utility purposes or in case of an emergency. The ASR Outdoor Thumb Assisted Pocket Knife is the trusty tool you need for outdoor adventuring and every day carry! Our ASR Outdoor Pocket Knife is constructed of high-quality 440 stainless steel that will never rust, so you can count on it rain or shine. It has an overall length of 8", a blade length of 3.5" and folds down to just 4.5" so it will easily fit in any pocket, backpack or travel bag. It features a black drop-point blade, which is designed with versatility in mind. Drop point knives are great for butchering tasks like cutting, skinning, and carving

ASR Outdoor 8" Woodsmen Folding Pocket Knife Wood Handle Camping Gear Carving

If you're an avid hunter, camper, hiker or outdoor enthusiast, then you know how important it is to have a durable pocket knife on hand for utility purposes or in case of an emergency. The ASR Outdoor Thumb Assisted Pocket Knife is the trusty tool you need for outdoor adventuring and every day carry!

Key Features

  • DURABLE DESIGN - Made of High-quality 440 Stainless Steel that Will Never Rust | Trusty Every Day Carry Tool, Rain or Shine
  • DROP POINT STYLE BLADE - Preferred Blade Style of Hunters, Designed with Versatility in Mind | Ideal Tool for Cutting, Skinning and Carving
  • COMPACT POCKET KNIFE - Overall Length: 8", Blade Length: 3.5", Folded Length: 4.5" | Easily Fits in Any Pocket, Backpack or Travel Bag for Convenience
  • THUMB-ASSISTED OPEN - Speedy Opening Mechanism Designed for Quick Deployment | Comes with Nylon Carrying Case and Belt Loop to Protect Knife When Not in Use
  • ERGONOMIC HANDLE - Classic Wood-grain Handle with Ergonomic Hand Grooves Adds Comfort and Prevents Slippage During Use | Great Self Defense Tool in Case of Emergency

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO45WHK440
  • UPC: 855569007478
  • Color: Brown
  • Size: 4.5 in

Our ASR Outdoor Pocket Knife is constructed of high-quality 440 stainless steel that will never rust, so you can count on it rain or shine. It has an overall length of 8", a blade length of 3.5" and folds down to just 4.5" so it will easily fit in any pocket, backpack or travel bag. It features a black drop-point blade, which is designed with versatility in mind. Drop point knives are great for butchering tasks like cutting, skinning, and carving.

The knife has a classic wood-grain handle for an aesthetic look, and the handle also features ergonomic hand grooves to prevent slippage during use. It's designed with a thumb-assisted opening mechanism, which means you don't need to worry about the speed of deployment, making this a great self-defense tool or an emergency seat belt cutter in case of a car crash. The handle also comes with a steel pocket clip for your easy storage when not in use.

Included with the folding pocket knife is a sturdy nylon black carrying case that also comes with a belt loop if you'd rather wear your knife on your belt for even faster deployment. This is a must-have everyday carry tool and is also a great gift idea for a friend or loved one
